author: guoang
description: Vim-style keyboard navigation for reading mode and built-in browser. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Guo Ang
manifest.description: Vim-style keyboard navigation for reading mode and built-in browser: scrolling (j/k/gg/G), half-page (Ctrl+d/f/u/b), tab switching (H/L), history (Ctrl+o/i), search (/), link hints (f/s).
manifest.name: Vim KeyNav

name: Vim KeyNav

releases.author: guoang
releases.description:
Initial release of Vim KeyNav for Obsidian.

**Features:**
- Vim-style scrolling in reading mode: `j`/`k`, `gg`/`G`, `Ctrl+d`/`Ctrl+u`/`Ctrl+f`/`Ctrl+b`
- Vimium-style link hints: `f`/`s` (current tab), `F`/`S` (new tab)
- Tab switching: `H`/`L`
- History navigation: `Ctrl+o`/`Ctrl+i`
- Search with `/`
- Full webview/built-in browser support including cross-origin iframes
